steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The notes describe a two-stage curing process: UV light projected into a resin pool cures the object layer by layer via the dead zone mechanism, then oven baking completes the cure. The answer must capture both stages accurately.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: misidentifies what the dead zone does. ✗
  • Choice B: misstates when curing is complete. ✗
  • Choice C — UV light cures layer by layer, oven baking completes the cure: directly and accurately expresses both stages of the mechanism. ✓
  • Choice D: buries the mechanism in awkward phrasing or adds extraneous detail. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
